Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x0E16 "CRILLIONII-0E16" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Crillion II (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: NOP'd out JSRs at $0E49 and $2192 to remove highscore loading and saving to disk.
